text:
- [escalation] Andy: Andrew Lang sends personal reflection email about trying to change or fix people.
- [escalation] Sarah Moyer: Sarah Moyer sent an empty email with no subject or content.
- [reply needed] Zamzar Limited: Zamzar requesting updated payment details to resolve a failed payment.
- [reply needed] Barry: Barry shares a NYTimes article about AI in curriculum that he thought Michael would find interesting.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch suggests posting a flat file of a home page without rotating quotes to save time.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch expresses concern that missing wayback sections mean they are 'toast'.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch instructs to capture 4-5 graphics from wayback that appear over time.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch shared WayBack snapshots and asks if missing sections of a website can be recovered.
- [decision required] Zamzar: Zamzar billing service reports a failed payment and requests updated payment details.
- [scheduling] Peter Nordlund: Peter Nordlund invites Matt and Michael to June 19 Scriptural Reasoning and asks if they can bring fruit.
- [scheduling] Sarah Moyer: Sarah Moyer updates that she missed the 10:30 and will arrive around 12:30 via Edmonds ferry.
